docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ULLOA, LUDIS ONEYDA CUBAS DOMINGUEZ, LAUDER GABRIEL AS TO DEFENDANT CAHVICH, SANTOS LOPEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF(S) LUDIS ONEYDA CUBAS ULLOA & GABRIEL LAUDER DOMINQUEZ ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANTOS LOPEZ CAHVICH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
